description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rustlang/rust:nightly Docker image and defines a single test stage with a test job. The job should run a before_script that updates apt, installs unzip and chromium, adds the wasm32-unknown-unknown target via rustup, downloads and extracts the specified wasm-bindgen version, moves the wasm-bindgen binary to /usr/bin, and downloads and unzips the specified chromedriver version. In the script section run rustc --version && cargo --version, then cargo +nightly test --manifest-path macros/Cargo.toml, then CHROMEDRIVER=`pwd`/chromedriver cargo +nightly test --target wasm32-unknown-unknown, and finally ./build_all_examples.sh. Define variables CARGO_HOME=$CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cargo, CHROME_DRIVER_VERSION='2.41', and WASM_BINDGEN_VERSION=0.2.43, with no caches, artifacts, or special rules.
